title: OUOBOB Dog Jumper for Large Size, Turtleneck Fall Christmas Pullover, Warm Extra Sweater, Pet Outfit Knitwear for Labrador, Golden Retriever, Doberman, Boxers 3XL
features: Elastic Fabric: The dog jumper large size dog is made of thickened Arctic velvet fabric, which is elastic, breathable, soft comfortable, and not easy to pill. This medium dog jumper can be machine washed, but cannot be bleached

Fashion Color Matching: This dog fall sweater focuses on comfort and warmth and incorporates fashion elements. The colorful stripes on the dog knit jumper make this jumper full of vitality and personality. Dog jumpers are suitable for girl and boy dogs

Comfortable Wearing: This extra-large dog jumper stands out for its comfortable wearing and high collar design, providing comprehensive warmth and care for your pet. The close-fitting cut of the big dog jumper ensures that the jumpershirt fits

Widely Used: Large breed dog jumper is suitable for your pet to wear on many occasions. Funny dog jumper can be worn on Christmas, New Year, Halloween, Thanksgiving, weddings, pet birthday parties, and daily wear

Multiple Sizes: Dog jumpers for medium and large dogs are available in 6 sizes in each color, M-4XL, suitable for medium and large dogs, such as French bulldogs, British bulldogs, beagle, Pug, corgi, Labrador, Golden Retriever, Great Dane, Doberman, etc
